title: Fix UVM elaboration of package dotted reference

features.name: parameterized class static member via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class instantiation accessed via :: operator to reach a static member in UVM callback context

features.name: chained static member access from parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a static member access chain where a parameterized class static member is used to access another nested static member

features.name: uvm_callbacks template instantiation static member access
features.description: Code should include a uvm_callbacks template instantiation with :: operator accessing a static member variable
